rationale: The cited paper is not just listed in the references; it is featured in Table 1 with specific findings and implications, and discussed again in the text describing special-issue contributions. This use helps the editorial substantiate its claim that mitigation research spans workplace safety and B2B decision contexts. Because the citation's function is to exemplify and document the special issue's content rather than to provide a direct theoretical or methodological foundation, a substantive other relation fits best.
relation_description: The editorial treats Chen et al. (2024) as a core example paper in the Mitigation in Marketing special issue, summarizing its causal findings on safety training and B2B procurement value. It uses this article to demonstrate the domain breadth and managerial relevance of the mitigation agenda.
